{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301341548E8C84F360B44E0DAC2"}"},"total":64},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7156833228186682124","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"破碎的内脏，凝固的鲜血，缠绕的触手，无神的眼珠，扭曲的植物，干瘪的肢体，残缺的大脑，猩红的果实。在红与白的对立中翻滚，在黄与褐的交融中沉寂。为我扫清这篇迷雾，让我得以窥见真实！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1666330242,"group_id":"7137595448818142215","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"偷得浮生半日闲，人间至味是清欢。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx8Fd44cwSQDy3BubzXQV+c9v0/sj9xTwsab/LF2zFKX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3316595595948244","user_name":"用户33165955"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3316595595948244","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1681698458,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7137595448818142215","book_info":{"abstract":"《克苏鲁神话》被誉为20世纪极具影响力的恐怖小说体系。作者霍华德·菲利普·洛夫克拉夫特倡导 “宇宙主义”，认为人类远非世界的主宰者，在尚未探索的未知宇宙中，隐藏着超乎想象、不可名状的恐怖真相，即便见上一眼就可能让人陷入疯狂或者死亡。正如作者所述：“人类最古老、最强烈的情感是恐惧；而最古老、最强烈的恐惧，是对未知的恐惧。”
本书收录了《克苏鲁的呼唤》《黑暗中的低语》《敦威治恐怖事件》等6篇中短篇故事，每一篇都足以唤起你内心深处对黑暗的恐惧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/27ed33976fe08c3db2fd3cfa917f92ba~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"霍华德·菲利普·洛夫克拉夫特","author_id":"","book_id":"7137595448818142215","book_name":"克苏鲁神话","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#405858","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"78.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":941,"name":"文学经典","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941&name=文学经典&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":397,"name":"外国文学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=397&name=外国文学&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7137595954055613479","read_count":"4406","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"162498"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"37","tags":"文学经典,外国文学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/27ed33976fe08c3db2fd3cfa917f92ba~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384856&x-signature=2NDfQ8kIa2HbVOonO4YXS6OfbgI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.453824e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301341548E8C84F360B44E0DAC2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读41分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":320,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2453,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":40462},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374453515740283658","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的故事很新奇，里面的怪物长得奇形怪状的，有些情节还挺吓人。不过我觉得这些故事也在提醒我们，不要随便去探索未知的领域，因为你不知道会遇到什么危险。就像书里的那些人，看到奇怪的东西就去追查，结果把自己陷入了险境。我们还是要对未知的世界保持敬畏之心啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714569378,"group_id":"7137595448818142215","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱是妒忌，爱是怀疑，爱是种近乎幻想的真理！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+d76t+hB5Vh0jjC6DyTfbmo6th1/Ll6ouMEXBTDMaXn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/58ab5bd4d77e4bd187e3eb585e3a0f9f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787713&x-signature=J5AVgq7upqae6b5XRVmtC%2BOxnlM%3D","user_id":"1574968021234152","user_name":"余梦_"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1574968021234152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7137595448818142215","book_info":{"abstract":"《克苏鲁神话》被誉为20世纪极具影响力的恐怖小说体系。作者霍华德·菲利普·洛夫克拉夫特倡导 “宇宙主义”，认为人类远非世界的主宰者，在尚未探索的未知宇宙中，隐藏着超乎想象、不可名状的恐怖真相，即便见上一眼就可能让人陷入疯狂或者死亡。正如作者所述：“人类最古老、最强烈的情感是恐惧；而最古老、最强烈的恐惧，是对未知的恐惧。”
